lab_references.notes: Standard maintenance fluids; reduce in SIADH, increase in fever/losses
Bazett formula (QT/sqrtRR); use Fridericia in tachycardia
Microphallus defined as < 2.5 cm in newborns
Adjust per nomogram; platelet monitoring required

ranges.range: 4 hours after loading and 4 hours after each rate change

lab_references.notes: CSF glucose should be >= 60% of simultaneous serum glucose
